data_science.title: Spectral Reach: Understanding Neural Scaling as Progress into the Spectral Tail
data_science.why_trending: Introduces 'spectral position' as a scalable measure for understanding neural scaling laws through eigenvalue analysis of the empirical neural tangent kernel, directly advancing foundation model development.
topics: Neural Scaling Laws and Mechanistic Interpretability

data_science.title: Toward Identifiable Sparse Autoencoders
data_science.why_trending: Proves sparse autoencoders are unstable across training runs and provides architectural fixes for identifiable SAEs, advancing neural network interpretability with theoretical guarantees.

data_science.title: Entropic Projection Alignment: Estimating, Explaining, and Improving Model Performance Under Distribution Shift
data_science.why_trending: Unified framework (EPA) for addressing distribution shift through importance weighting with closed-form solution, applicable to performance estimation, feature attribution, and domain adaptation.

data_science.title: Industrializing Prediction-Powered Inference: The GLIDE Library for Reliable GenAI and Agentic Systems Evaluation
data_science.why_trending: GLIDE library industrializes prediction-powered inference for evaluating LLM and agentic systems with valid uncertainty, unifying scattered PPI methods into production-ready code.
topics: LLM-Driven Applications in Finance and Economics

data_science.title: Why Linear Recurrent Memory Works in Partially Observable Reinforcement Learning
data_science.why_trending: Provides theoretical justification for why linear recurrent networks work as memory units in partially observable RL by showing they reproduce belief-state sufficient statistics.

finance.title: Stochastic Volatility, Jumps, and Rates: A Unified Framework for Option Pricing and Term-Structure Simulation
finance.why_trending: Develops integrated stochastic framework combining Heston, Bates, and CIR models with FFT calibration for multi-asset option pricing and interest-rate risk, advancing derivatives valuation.

finance.title: Distributional Portfolio Optimization (DPO): A Unified Framework for Distributions over Weights, Returns, and Parameters
finance.why_trending: Introduces Distributional Portfolio Optimization (DPO) as unified framework treating weights, returns, and parameters as distributions, unifying Bayesian, robust, and stochastic allocation approaches.
topics: Portfolio Optimization and Asset Pricing Frameworks

finance.title: PortBench: A Correlation-Aware, Full-Pipeline Benchmark for LLM-Driven Portfolio Management
finance.why_trending: PortBench establishes first correlation-aware, end-to-end benchmark for LLM-driven portfolio management with 6,269 QA pairs spanning six asset classes over a decade.
topics: LLM-Driven Applications in Finance and Economics

finance.title: From Classical Optimization to Bayesian Integration: A Comprehensive Analysis of Systematic Portfolio Management
finance.why_trending: Comprehensive systematic comparison of mean-variance, constrained optimization, factor models, Monte Carlo, and Black-Litterman approaches on real portfolio data from 2023-2025.
topics: Portfolio Optimization and Asset Pricing Frameworks

social_sciences.title: A Lecture Note on Offline RL and IRL, Part II: Foundations of Inverse Reinforcement Learning and Dynamic Discrete Choice Models
social_sciences.why_trending: Proves equivalence between structural econometric discrete-choice models and entropy-regularized inverse RL, establishing theoretical foundations linking two communities and enabling method transfer.

social_sciences.title: Competitive Many-to-One Matching: Sorting vs. Equality
social_sciences.why_trending: Characterizes competitive equilibrium with peer effects in many-to-one matching, showing when workforces segregate by skill versus compress, with implications for labor market inequality.

social_sciences.title: Long-Term Health and Human Capital Effects of Universal Health Care and Mass Literacy: Evidence from Cuba
social_sciences.why_trending: Estimates causal impacts of Cuba's 1961 health service and literacy campaign using synthetic control on newly assembled 122-year historical data, finding persistent 15-29% mortality reduction.

social_sciences.title: Comparing Market Mechanism Efficiencies
social_sciences.why_trending: Game-theoretic framework comparing welfare efficiency of lit exchanges, dark pools, and batch auctions, showing dark pools dominate under moderate conditions through cost-benefit analysis.

social_sciences.title: Moment-Based Inference for Regression with Latent Dirichlet Covariates
social_sciences.why_trending: Develops moment-based inference for regression with latent Dirichlet covariates, addressing plug-in bias from topic models in downstream analysis with rigorous uncertainty propagation.

topics.name: Neural Scaling Laws and Mechanistic Interpretability
topics.summary: Papers investigating how neural networks scale with size/compute and mechanistic interpretability through spectral analysis, sparse autoencoders, polysemanticity disentanglement, and activation steering to understand what models learn.

topics.name: Sparse Autoencoders and Representation Disentanglement
topics.summary: Methods for decomposing entangled neural representations into interpretable, monosemantic features via sparse coding, disentangled semantics, and activation steering for improved understanding and control.

topics.name: Distribution Shift and Domain Adaptation
topics.summary: Frameworks for handling distribution shift through importance weighting, estimating target-domain performance, explaining shifts, and providing algorithmic recourse under domain mismatch.

topics.name: Portfolio Optimization and Asset Pricing Frameworks
topics.summary: Unified and integrated frameworks for portfolio construction combining classical optimization, Bayesian methods, factor models, and distributional approaches with empirical validation.

topics.name: Reinforcement Learning for Decision-Making
topics.summary: Theoretical foundations and applications of RL including memory mechanisms in partially-observable settings, survival RL, terminal representations, offline RL equivalences, and portfolio allocation.

topics.name: Market Mechanisms and Institutional Efficiency
topics.summary: Game-theoretic and economic analyses comparing welfare efficiency of different market structures (auctions, exchanges, matching), studying matching mechanisms, strategy-proofness, and market-making.

topics.name: Causal Inference and Treatment Effects
topics.summary: Statistical methods for causal estimation including moment-based inference with latent covariates, longitudinal treatment effects, synthetic controls, sensitivity analysis, and specification testing.

topics.name: Stochastic Processes and Volatility Modeling
topics.summary: Advanced time-series models for financial returns including stochastic volatility, jumps, copulas, regime-switching, and heavy-tailed dynamics for option pricing and risk assessment.

topics.name: LLM-Driven Applications in Finance and Economics
topics.summary: Using large language models for financial decision-making including portfolio management, trading agents, evaluation frameworks, and risk assessment with reliability and ethics considerations.

topics.name: Anomaly Detection and Predictive Maintenance
topics.summary: ML methods for detecting equipment faults, remaining useful life prediction, and encrypted traffic analysis in operational systems using CNNs, autoencoders, and protocol-agnostic models.
